Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Activity

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Activity
public class Activity extends Object
Activity

Activity is a representation of several ledger entries rolled up for easy correlation and usage

    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityGrossAmount>

    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityInterest>
    interest()
    Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityInterestPayment>
    interestPayment()
    Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityLiquidation>
    liquidation()
    Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityMaturity>
    maturity()
    Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityMerger>
    merger()
    Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger
    Optional<String>
    name()
    accounts/{account_id}/activities/{activity_id}
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityNameChange>
    nameChange()
    Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityNetAmount>
    netAmount()
    The monetary value of an activity, inclusive of fees, withholding, commisions, etc (Second Money)
    Optional<String>
    nextActivityId()
    can be an empty string if there is no next activity is populated when there is a modification resulting in a new activity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<NextActivityProcessDate>
    nextActivityProcessDate()
    the process date of the next activity(nil if the next_activity_id is an empty string)
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<None>
    none()
    None
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityPaymentInKind>
    paymentInKind()
    Used to record payments on interest-bearing securities where the payment is made in additional securities rather than cash and details related to the payment
    Optional<String>
    previousActivityId()
    When populated, the activity_id of that precedes this one
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PreviousProcessDate>
    previousProcessDate()
    When populated, the processing_date of the previous_activity_id
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityPrice>
    price()
    The monetary value paid for a given security in a trade Not populated on a currency only movement
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityProcessDate>
    processDate()
    The date that the activity was booked to the ledger
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityQuantity>
    quantity()
    The quantity of shares bought, sold, or moved for a given entry/activity Required if activity.state != PENDING
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRedemptionFull>
    redemptionFull()
    Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRedemptionPartial>
    redemptionPartial()
    Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption.
    Optional<String>
    regionCode()
    Two character region code, complies with https://cldr.unicode.org/index
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityReverseStockSplit>
    reverseStockSplit()
    Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRightsDistribution>
    rightsDistribution()
    Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRightsSubscription>
    rightsSubscription()
    Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription.
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRoundingAdjustment>
    roundingAdjustment()
    Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RoundingAmount>
    roundingAmount()
    the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry
    Optional<String>
    roundingReason()
    Free form text field providing reason for rounding
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySaleOfRights>
    saleOfRights()
    Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySettleDate>
    settleDate()
    The date a given activity will officially settle
    Optional<ActivitySide>
    side()
    Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell
    Optional<ActivitySideModifier>
    sideModifier()
    Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySpinoff>
    spinoff()
    Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff.
    Optional<ActivityState>
    state()
    The state of the activity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityStockDividend>
    stockDividend()
    Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityStockSplit>
    stockSplit()
    Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split
    Optional<String>
    subtypeCategory()
    String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/ activity
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySweep>
    sweep()
    Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityTenderOffer>
    tenderOffer()
    Used to record the sale of securities for a specified price due to an offer from the issuer or a third party and details related to the tender offer
    String
    toString()
     
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityTrade>
    trade()
    Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityTransfer>
    transfer()
    Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer.
    Optional<ActivityType>
    type()
    The type of activity this is
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityUnitSplit>
    unitSplit()
    Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split
    org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityWarrantExercise>
    warrantExercise()
    Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise.

    withRoundingAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment)

    Activity
    withRoundingAmount(RoundingAmount roundingAmount)
    the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry
    Activity
    withRoundingAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RoundingAmount> roundingAmount)
    the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry
    Activity

  • Method Details

    • acatsPendingOut

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityAcatsPendingOut> acatsPendingOut()
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

    • accountId

      public Optional<String> accountId()
      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • accountMemo

      public Optional<ActivityAccountMemo> accountMemo()
      Indicates the memo location impacted by an entry

    • accountTransfer

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityAccountTransfer> accountTransfer()
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares during the bookkeeping phase of an account transfer and details related to the account transfer

    • accruedInterest

      public Optional<List<AccruedInterest>> accruedInterest()
      Any accrued interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the activity

    • accruedInterestDesc

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<AccruedInterestDesc> accruedInterestDesc()
      Used to record the amount of interest that has been earned but not yet paid between the last interest payment and the date of the trade

    • activityDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityActivityDate> activityDate()
      The activity date refers to the specific calendar day on which a financial transaction, such as a trade at an exchange or a deposit at a bank, was executed. This date is specific to the institution where the transaction took place, capturing the exact day on which the institution formally records and effects the transaction

    • activityDescription

      public Optional<String> activityDescription()
      The description for an activity. This may include special instructions, symbol description, etc when relavant

    • activityId

      public Optional<String> activityId()
      Apex-generated unique activity identifier

    • activityTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> activityTime()
      Activity time refers to the precise moment, recorded in Coordinated Universal Time (UTC), when a financial transaction is executed as reported to Apex

    • allocation

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityAllocation> allocation()
      Object containing metadata for trade allocation

    • assetDescription

      public Optional<String> assetDescription()
      Name of the issuer of a security and additional descriptive information about the particular issue

    • assetId

      public Optional<String> assetId()
      An Apex-provided, global identifier created on a per asset bases which provides connectivity across all areas Not populated on a currency only movement

    • bondDefault

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityBondDefault> bondDefault()
      Object containing metadata for bond defaults

    • capitalGains

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityCapitalGains> capitalGains()
      Used to record a distribution of cash that an issuer has determined will be declared as income financed from capital gains and not ordinary income and details related to the capital gain

    • cashDividend

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityCashDividend> cashDividend()
      Used to record the distribution of cash to shareholders, paid by the issuer, usually based upon current earnings and/or accumulated profits as declared by the board of directors and details related to the cash dividend

    • cashInLieu

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityCashInLieu> cashInLieu()
      Object containing metadata for cash in lieu

    • commission

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityCommission> commission()
      Used to record commission charged by brokers or financial intermediaries for executing financial transactions on behalf of clients

    • commissions

      public Optional<List<Commission>> commissions()
      Any commissions associated with the activity

    • conversion

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityConversion> conversion()
      Used to record the conversion of securities (generally convertible bonds or preferred shares) into another form of securities (usually common shares) at a pre-stated price or rate and details related to the conversion

    • corporateActionMemoAdjustment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityCorporateActionMemoAdjustment> corporateActionMemoAdjustment()
      Used to record memo location adjustments initiated by the corporate action system due to reorg events

    • correspondentId

      public Optional<String> correspondentId()
      A unique identifier referencing a Correspondent

    • creationTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> creationTime()
      The date/time an activity was created in the ledger

    • credit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityCredit> credit()
      Used to disburse funds into a customer's account, typically for purposes such as refunds, interest payments, or rewards from enrolled programs and details related to the credit

    • currencyAssetId

      public Optional<String> currencyAssetId()
      Required if any currency field like `price, gross_amount, trade.markup, fee.amount` is provided. The currency's ascend asset_id

    • currencyCode

      public Optional<String> currencyCode()
      The currency associated with the security Populated on a currency movement

    • deposit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityDeposit> deposit()
      Used to record deposits of funds into an account and capture details related to the deposit

    • drip

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityDrip> drip()
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_drip memo location

    • exchange

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityExchange> exchange()
      Used to record the exchange of certificates for a new security or cash and details related to the exchange

    • fee

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityFee> fee()
      Used to record Fees that have been assessed to account and capture details related to the fee

    • fees

      public Optional<List<Fee>> fees()
      Any fees associated with the activity

    • fpsl

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityFpsl> fpsl()
      Used to record the movements of shares to/ from the fpsl memo location and details related to the fpsl memo

    • generation

      public Optional<String> generation()
      For a given set of activity that are part of the same lineage the highest generation will be the most recent activity

    • grossAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityGrossAmount> grossAmount()
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees, withholdings, accrued_interest, or commissions (First money)

    • interest

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityInterest> interest()
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • interestPayment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityInterestPayment> interestPayment()
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • liquidation

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityLiquidation> liquidation()
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • maturity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityMaturity> maturity()
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • merger

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityMerger> merger()
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      accounts/{account_id}/activities/{activity_id}

    • nameChange

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityNameChange> nameChange()
      Used to record changes in the name of a security/securities by the issuer which result in surrendering physical securities or the assigning of a new security identifier which result in new securities being issued and details related to the name changes

    • netAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityNetAmount> netAmount()
      The monetary value of an activity, inclusive of fees, withholding, commisions, etc (Second Money)

    • nextActivityId

      public Optional<String> nextActivityId()
      can be an empty string if there is no next activity is populated when there is a modification resulting in a new activity

    • nextActivityProcessDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<NextActivityProcessDate> nextActivityProcessDate()
      the process date of the next activity(nil if the next_activity_id is an empty string)

    • none

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<None> none()
      None

    • paymentInKind

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityPaymentInKind> paymentInKind()
      Used to record payments on interest-bearing securities where the payment is made in additional securities rather than cash and details related to the payment

    • previousActivityId

      public Optional<String> previousActivityId()
      When populated, the activity_id of that precedes this one

    • previousProcessDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PreviousProcessDate> previousProcessDate()
      When populated, the processing_date of the previous_activity_id

    • price

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityPrice> price()
      The monetary value paid for a given security in a trade Not populated on a currency only movement

    • processDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityProcessDate> processDate()
      The date that the activity was booked to the ledger

    • quantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityQuantity> quantity()
      The quantity of shares bought, sold, or moved for a given entry/activity Required if activity.state != PENDING

    • redemptionFull

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRedemptionFull> redemptionFull()
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • redemptionPartial

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRedemptionPartial> redemptionPartial()
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

    • regionCode

      public Optional<String> regionCode()
      Two character region code, complies with https://cldr.unicode.org/index

    • reverseStockSplit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityReverseStockSplit> reverseStockSplit()
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • rightsDistribution

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRightsDistribution> rightsDistribution()
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • rightsSubscription

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRightsSubscription> rightsSubscription()
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • roundingAdjustment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityRoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment()
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • roundingAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<RoundingAmount> roundingAmount()
      the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry

    • roundingReason

      public Optional<String> roundingReason()
      Free form text field providing reason for rounding

    • saleOfRights

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySaleOfRights> saleOfRights()
      Used to record payments made by the issuer to security holders when the security is subject to redemptions other than full and partial calls (e.g., early CD redemptions) and details related to the sale of rights

    • settleDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySettleDate> settleDate()
      The date a given activity will officially settle

    • side

      public Optional<ActivitySide> side()
      Denotes whether the trade is a buy or sell

    • sideModifier

      public Optional<ActivitySideModifier> sideModifier()
      Indicates whether the trade is opening a new position or closing an existing position

    • spinoff

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySpinoff> spinoff()
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • state

      public Optional<ActivityState> state()
      The state of the activity

    • stockDividend

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityStockDividend> stockDividend()
      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend

    • stockSplit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityStockSplit> stockSplit()
      Used to record the increase in a company's number of outstanding shares of stock without any change in the shareholder's equity or the aggregate market value at the time of the split and details related to the stock split

    • subtypeCategory

      public Optional<String> subtypeCategory()
      String representation of the metadata object containing more information about an entry/ activity

    • sweep

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivitySweep> sweep()
      Used to record sweeps from a cash balance to an alternative asset or vice versa and details related to the sweep

    • tenderOffer

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityTenderOffer> tenderOffer()
      Used to record the sale of securities for a specified price due to an offer from the issuer or a third party and details related to the tender offer

    • trade

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityTrade> trade()
      Used to record the the execution of a buy or sell transaction resulting in the transfer of securities and corresponding payment and details related to the trade

    • transfer

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityTransfer> transfer()
      Used to record more generic transfers of funds or securities and details related to the transfer. The transfer type and activity_description can be used to provide more specific context

    • type

      public Optional<ActivityType> type()
      The type of activity this is

    • unitSplit

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityUnitSplit> unitSplit()
      Used to record increases in the number of units outstanding through the issuing of more units to current shareholders and details related to the unit split

    • warrantExercise

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityWarrantExercise> warrantExercise()
      Used to record the exchange of warrants for shares and details related to the warrant exercise. The exercise will commonly require a payment based upon a pre-determined value and time and details related to the warrant exercise

    • withdrawal

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityWithdrawal> withdrawal()
      Used to record withdrawals of funds from an account and capture details related to the withdrawal

    • withdrawalPendingReview

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityWithdrawalPendingReview> withdrawalPendingReview()
      Used to record the movement of funds to/ from the pending_withdrawal memo location

    • withholding

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityWithholding> withholding()
      Used to record tax withholdings and details related to the withholding

    • withholdings

      public Optional<List<Withholding>> withholdings()
      Any withholdings associated with the activity

    • worthless

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ActivityWorthless> worthless()
      Used to record the removal of positions in a given security when the DTC has received formal notice that the security is worthless and details related to the worthless event

    • builder

      public static Activity.Builder builder()

    • withAcatsPendingOut

      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

      public Activity withAcatsPendingOut(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityAcatsPendingOut> acatsPendingOut)
      Used to record the movement of funds or shares to/ from the pending_acats memo location

      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

      A globally unique identifier referencing a single account; this is the main identifier for an account used for machine-to-machine interactions

    • withGrossAmount

      public Activity withGrossAmount(ActivityGrossAmount grossAmount)
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees, withholdings, accrued_interest, or commissions (First money)

      public Activity withGrossAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityGrossAmount> grossAmount)
      The monetary value of an activity, exclusive of any fees, withholdings, accrued_interest, or commissions (First money)

    • withInterest

      public Activity withInterest(ActivityInterest interest)
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • withInterest

      public Activity withInterest(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityInterest> interest)
      Used to record the payment of interest to accounts that have maintained a cash balance or the charging of interest to accounts that have used margin and details related to the interest

    • withInterestPayment

      public Activity withInterestPayment(ActivityInterestPayment interestPayment)
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • withInterestPayment

      public Activity withInterestPayment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityInterestPayment> interestPayment)
      Used to record the The payment of an obligation an issuer has agreed to make to holders of an interest-bearing security and details related to the interest payment. Usually, the payment is made in cash and on a scheduled basis

    • withLiquidation

      public Activity withLiquidation(ActivityLiquidation liquidation)
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • withLiquidation

      public Activity withLiquidation(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityLiquidation> liquidation)
      Used to record the dismantling of a business by an issuer, paying off debts in order of priority and distributing the remaining assets in cash and/or securities to the owners of the securities and details related to the liquidation

    • withMaturity

      public Activity withMaturity(ActivityMaturity maturity)
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • withMaturity

      public Activity withMaturity(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityMaturity> maturity)
      Used to record he final repayment, usually in cash, by an issuer for the entire issue, or remaining outstanding securities of a specific security on a specified date and details related to the maturity

    • withMerger

      public Activity withMerger(ActivityMerger merger)
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

      public Activity withMerger(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityMerger> merger)
      Used to record the exchange of one company's security for another company's security, cash, or a combination of cash and securities and details related to the merger

    • withNameChange

      public Activity withNameChange(ActivityNameChange nameChange)

    • withRedemptionFull

      public Activity withRedemptionFull(ActivityRedemptionFull redemptionFull)
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • withRedemptionFull

      public Activity withRedemptionFull(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRedemptionFull> redemptionFull)
      Used to record the redemption of a security for cash in its entirety for which the holders receive the principal amount of the security and details related to the redemption

    • withRedemptionPartial

      public Activity withRedemptionPartial(ActivityRedemptionPartial redemptionPartial)
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

    • withRedemptionPartial

      public Activity withRedemptionPartial(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRedemptionPartial> redemptionPartial)
      Used when securities are redeemed by the issuer for cash, in part, before their scheduled maturity date and details related to the redemption. The outstanding amount of securities will be proportionally reduced based on a specific percentage of holding

      public Activity withRegionCode(String regionCode)
      Two character region code, complies with https://cldr.unicode.org/index

    • withRegionCode

      Two character region code, complies with https://cldr.unicode.org/index

    • withReverseStockSplit

      public Activity withReverseStockSplit(ActivityReverseStockSplit reverseStockSplit)
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • withReverseStockSplit

      public Activity withReverseStockSplit(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityReverseStockSplit> reverseStockSplit)
      Used to record the exchange of a company's security for the same company's new security at a preset rate and details related to the reverse stock split

    • withRightsDistribution

      public Activity withRightsDistribution(ActivityRightsDistribution rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • withRightsDistribution

      public Activity withRightsDistribution(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRightsDistribution> rightsDistribution)
      Used to record distributions to common stock holders of a company that grant the option to purchase new or additional securities of the same company during a predetermined time period at a predetermined price and details related to the rights distribution

    • withRightsSubscription

      public Activity withRightsSubscription(ActivityRightsSubscription rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • withRightsSubscription

      public Activity withRightsSubscription(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRightsSubscription> rightsSubscription)
      Used to record the purchase of new or additional securities and details related to the subscription. Rights are often tradable in a secondary market

    • withRoundingAdjustment

      public Activity withRoundingAdjustment(ActivityRoundingAdjustment roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • withRoundingAdjustment

      public Activity withRoundingAdjustment(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivityRoundingAdjustment> roundingAdjustment)
      Used to record rounding adjustments when the sum(price x quantity) of all entries for a given activity do not equal the price x quantity of the fully formed activity record

    • withRoundingAmount

      public Activity withRoundingAmount(RoundingAmount roundingAmount)
      the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry

    • withRoundingAmount

      public Activity withRoundingAmount(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends RoundingAmount> roundingAmount)
      the difference between the aggregation of gross_amount from the trade entries and the rounded gross_amount of the fully formed activity This amount can also be found as a rounding_adjustment entry

    • withRoundingReason

      public Activity withRoundingReason(String roundingReason)
      Free form text field providing reason for rounding

    • withRoundingReason

      public Activity withRoundingReason(Optional<String> roundingReason)
      Free form text field providing reason for rounding

    • withSaleOfRights

    • withSpinoff

      public Activity withSpinoff(ActivitySpinoff spinoff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

    • withSpinoff

      public Activity withSpinoff(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ActivitySpinoff> spinoff)
      Used to record a distribution of subsidiary securities to the shareholders of the parent company without a surrender of securities or payment and details related to the spinoff. A spin-off represents a form of divestiture resulting in an independent company

      Used to record a dividend paid to shareholders in the form of shares of stock in either the issuing company or in another company and details related to the stock dividend
